\begin{problem}{Even or Odd Subtasks}{standard input}{standard output}{1.0 seconds}{256 megabytes}

Given an integer $N$, determine if it is even or odd.

\inputfile
A single integer $N$ ($1 \le N \le 10^9$).

\outputfile
Output "Even" if $N$ is even, or "Odd" if $N$ is odd.

\example
\input{../../tests/01}
\output{../../tests/01.a}

\note
For the first example, 4 is even, so output is "Even".

\end{problem}
